# ProshnoBank - SEO Robots Configuration
# This file tells search engines how to crawl the site

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /api
Disallow: /private
Disallow: /.env
Disallow: /node_modules

# Specific rules for search engines
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 0

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: Twitterbot
Allow: /

User-agent: facebookexternalhit
Allow: /

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://proshnobank.app/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://proshnobank.app/sitemap-en.xml
